setup.title: New Game
setup.resumeBody: You have an unfinished game. Continue or start a new one?

validation.nameTooLong: Name must be 20 characters or fewer

errors.wrongPhase: You can't do that right now
errors.setTooLong: A set can have at most 4 cards
errors.setDuplicateSuit: A set cannot have duplicate suits
errors.sequenceMixedSuits: A sequence must be all the same suit
errors.sequenceNotConsecutive: Cards must be consecutive in a sequence
errors.jokerLimitExceeded: Too many Jokers in this combination
errors.meldBelow51: Meld must be worth at least 51 points
errors.notYetMelded: You must place your initial meld first
errors.jokerClaimNotYourTurn: You can only claim a Joker on your turn
errors.jokerClaimWrongCard: You don't have the card to replace this Joker
errors.jokerClaimBreaks: Replacing this Joker would break the combination
errors.cardNotInHand: That card is not in your hand
errors.combinationNotOnTable: That combination is not on the table
errors.jokerClaimAmbiguousSet: Select both missing suit cards to claim this Joker
errors.drawnDiscardNotInMeld: You must include the card you drew from the discard pile in your meld
